title: oncella ambigua
intro: Oncella ambigua is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in the tropical forests of Africa. The medicinal properties of Oncella ambigua include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Oncella ambigua include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and ulcers. Traditionally, Oncella ambigua has been prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions and decoctions, to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate various health issues.
